paper_focus.title: Decomposition in Fe–Mn–Al–C lightweight steels
paper_focus.research_objective: To elucidate the conditions and mechanisms governing the different austenite decomposition reactions (discontinuous precipitation, precipitation transformation, cellular transformation, and spinodal decomposition) in Fe–Mn–Al–C lightweight steels as a function of alloy composition and tempering temperature.
material_systems: key phases: γ-austenite, δ/α-ferrite, κ-carbide (MxCy as κ)
sample series: 9Al-10Mn, 12Al-10Mn, 12Al-20Mn, 12Al-30Mn with varying C levels
main_process_variables: alloy composition: Al (9-12 wt%), Mn (10, 20, 30 wt%), C (0.4, 1 wt%)
